scope: pi-loop plus pi-ace-adapter ACE integration for general software-engineering loop use cases

commands.evidence: 93/93 node --test checks passed, including ACE command/resource loading from built adapter dist, daemon-launch event handoff, packaged proof assets, domain-neutral dataset/playbook checks, and no Rails penalty for non-Rails work.
TypeScript no-emit check passed for pi-loop.
pi-loop smoke extension check completed successfully.
Dry-run package contents include ace/datasets/general-loop-proof.jsonl, ace/playbooks/pi-loop-general.md, ace/proof/verification.json, and pi-loop extension files.
The adapter extension entrypoint used by pi-loop loads from built JavaScript under node_modules instead of TypeScript source.
pi-ace-adapter compiled TypeScript source into dist/*.js and dist/*.d.ts entrypoints.
TypeScript no-emit check passed for pi-ace-adapter daemon runner, event listener, and /ace start command.
Direct command-handler smoke covers import/use/off, feedback redaction, /ace start dry-run daemon launch, and offline training through a fake ACE module.
Dry-run package contents include dist JS/declaration files, prompts, skills, scripts/run_pi_ace.py, smoke scripts, source files, and build tsconfig.

commands.command: if rg -n <single-domain benchmark patterns> /Users/leonardopereira/Poetry/pi-loop /Users/leonardopereira/Poetry/pi-ace-adapter; then exit 1; else exit 0; fi
commands.evidence: No matching single-domain benchmark references were found in pi-loop or pi-ace-adapter.

provedBehaviors: pi-loop package manifest loads pi-ace-adapter built JS extension plus skill and prompt resources.
pi-loop kickoff can request a daemon-style ACE launch through the adapter event bus when ACE context is enabled.
ACE launch state records pid, output, metadata, stdout, and stderr paths for later inspection.
The included playbook and dataset are general engineering assets and contain no single-domain assumptions.
knownLimitations: Detached ACE process completion is inspected through the run metadata/log files rather than reconciled live into pi-loop after process exit.
Adapter CLI smoke coverage for command execution depends on Pi print-mode slash-command behavior and is not used as release proof in this record.
